title: Initialize Git branch test/e2e-full-application
description: Create branch 'test/e2e-full-application' from current HEAD. Workspace root: d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine.

title: Create E2E test scenarios and execute
description:
Workspace root: d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine.

## Server Info
- Backend API: http://localhost:8000 (must be started before running tests)
- Start command: `cd d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine\backend; & d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1; $env:GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS = 'D:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine\gen-lang-client-0575690477-7f0434f5aa44.json'; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000 --host 0.0.0.0`
- Database: SQLite at backend/data/cse.db

## CRITICAL: Rate Limiting
The participant `/respond` endpoint has a 2-second rate limit per session. You MUST add `time.sleep(2.5)` between consecutive answer submissions for the SAME session.

## E2E Scenarios to Create and Execute

Create `shared/e2e_scenarios.json` with the following scenarios, then execute each one against the running server.

### Phase 1: Infrastructure (no LLM needed)
- **S001**: GET http://localhost:8000/health → expect 200, body has status='ok'
- **S002**: GET http://localhost:8000/ → expect 200, body has 'name', 'version', 'docs'

### Phase 2: Admin CRUD — Dynamic Mode (no LLM needed)
- **S003**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys with body: {"title": "E2E Dynamic Survey", "context": "Customer satisfaction for an e-commerce platform", "goal": "Understand customer pain points in checkout flow", "constraints": ["Keep questions focused on checkout experience", "Avoid leading questions"], "max_questions": 5, "question_mode": "dynamic"} → expect 201, body has id, title matches, question_mode='dynamic'
- **S004**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys → expect 200, body.surveys array contains survey from S003 (match by title)
- **S005**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S003} → expect 200, has total_sessions=0
- **S006**: PUT http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S003} with body: {"title": "E2E Dynamic Survey Updated"} → expect 200, title updated
- **S007**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S003}/stats → expect 200, has survey_id, total_sessions, completed_sessions fields
- **S008**: DELETE http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S003} → expect 204

### Phase 3: Admin CRUD — Preset Mode (no LLM needed)
- **S009**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys with body: {"title": "E2E Preset Survey", "context": "Employee engagement at a tech company", "goal": "Measure team morale and identify improvement areas", "constraints": ["Keep questions professional", "Avoid personal questions"], "max_questions": 3, "question_mode": "preset"} → expect 201, question_mode='preset'
- **S010**: PUT http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009}/preset-questions with body: {"questions": [{"question_number": 1, "question_id": "pq1", "text": "How satisfied are you with your current team collaboration?"}, {"question_number": 2, "question_id": "pq2", "text": "What is the biggest challenge you face in your daily work?"}, {"question_number": 3, "question_id": "pq3", "text": "How would you rate management communication?"}]} → expect 200, status='updated'
- **S011**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009} → expect 200, preset_questions has 3 items, first item text matches
- **S012**: Create a second dynamic survey for error testing: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys with body: {"title": "E2E Dynamic For Error Test", "context": "Test context", "goal": "Test goal", "max_questions": 3, "question_mode": "dynamic"} → expect 201. Then POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{new_survey_id}/generate-questions → expect 400 (wrong mode)

### Phase 4: Participant Flow — Preset Mode (no LLM needed)
- **S013**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009}/sessions with body: {} → expect 201, current_question.text matches preset Q1 text
- **S014**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009}/sessions/{session_id}/respond with body: {"answer": "I think collaboration is generally good but could be improved with better tools", "question_id": "{current_question.question_id}", "question_text": "{current_question.text}"} → expect 200, status='active', question.text matches preset Q2. WAIT 2.5 seconds before this call.
- **S015**: Submit answer to Q2, then WAIT 2.5s, submit answer to Q3 → after Q3 answer, expect status='completed' or completion_reason is set. WAIT 2.5 seconds between each answer.
- **S016**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009}/sessions/{session_id} → expect 200, conversation has 3 entries
- **S017**: POST respond on completed session → expect 409

### Phase 5: Participant Flow — Dynamic Mode (LLM-dependent, may fail gracefully)
- **S018**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/surveys/{dynamic_survey_id}/sessions with body: {} → expect 201, has current_question with text. (Use survey from S012 error test or create a new dynamic survey)
- **S019**: POST respond with answer: "The checkout process takes too long and has too many steps" → expect 200, has either next question or completion. WAIT 2.5 seconds before this call.

### Phase 6: Error Handling (no LLM needed)
- **S020**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/surveys/nonexistent-id-12345/sessions → expect 404
- **S021**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/nonexistent-id-12345 → expect 404
- **S022**: POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys with body: {"title": "Bad", "context": "x", "goal": "x", "question_mode": "invalid_mode"} → expect 422
- **S023**: POST respond with empty answer body or answer='' → expect 422
- **S024**: Create a new session on preset survey, then POST exit → expect 200, status='exited'
- **S025**: POST respond on exited session → expect 409

### Phase 7: Cross-Layer Verification (no LLM needed)
- **S026**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009}/responses → expect 200, responses array contains session from S013-S016
- **S027**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys/{survey_id_from_S009} → expect total_sessions >= 1, completed_sessions >= 1
- **S028**: GET http://localhost:8000/api/v1/admin/surveys?skip=0&limit=1 → expect 200, surveys array has exactly 1 item, total >= 1

## Output
Write results to shared/e2e_scenarios.json with result (PASS/FAIL/ERROR/SKIP), failure_summary, and bug_fix_hint for each scenario.

title: Push E2E test results to branch
description: Commit shared/e2e_scenarios.json and any E2E test files to 'test/e2e-full-application' branch. Commit message: 'test: add E2E test scenarios and results for full application'. Workspace root: d:\GitHub\conversational-survey-engine.
